fields.label: Tax Name
fields.description: e.g. VAT, NHIL, GETFund Levy, Tourism Levy

fields.label: Type
fields.options:
On Net Total
On Previous Row Amount
On Previous Row Total
Actual
fields.description: On Net Total: % of the room subtotal. On Previous Row Amount: % of a prior row's tax amount. On Previous Row Total: % of the running total after a prior row. Actual: a fixed flat amount.

fields.label: Row #
fields.depends_on: eval:['On Previous Row Amount','On Previous Row Total'].includes(doc.charge_type)
fields.description: Row number of the tax row to base this calculation on (e.g. 1, 2)

fields.label: Rate / Amount
fields.description: Percentage (e.g. 15 for 15%) when Type is On Net Total or On Previous Row. Flat amount when Type is Actual.

fields.label: ERPXpand Tax Account
fields.description: Optional: link to an ERPXpand Account of type Tax. Auto-fills Tax Name when selected.

fields.label: From Date
fields.description: Leave blank to apply from the beginning

fields.label: To Date
fields.description: Leave blank for no end date (ongoing)
